news.summary: This information is not intended for distribution to United States newswire services or for dissemination in the United States and is not an offer of securities for sale in the United States.
news.headline: Yukon Metals secures C$10 million financing. Not for US distribution or sale.
Germany’s Incoming Chancellor Merz: I expect CDU, CSU and SPD will all agree to this coalition deal.

news.summary: In Lesotho, a country known for producing denim used in American-branded jeans, both private sector companies and the government were considering their next steps.
news.headline: Lesotho, a small denim producer facing high tariffs in US, seeks best response strategy with private and public sectors.
ECB: Forex reserves fell €8.3 bln to €338 bln.
ECB settled €275.0 bln corporate bond purchases.
ECB settled €2,047.2 bln public-sector bond purchases.

news.summary: A study conducted by researchers at The Ohio State University Wexner Medical Center and James Comprehensive Cancer Center revealed that patients with metastatic pancreatic cancer who are socially vulnerable were notably less likely to receive essential aspects of quality care. This group also experienced lower survival rates. The findings underscore the disparities in medical treatment and outcomes experienced by socially vulnerable individuals facing metastatic pancreatic cancer.
news.headline: Study at Ohio State University finds stark disparities in treatment for metastatic pancreatic cancer patients, impacting survival.

news.summary: In a recent development, Casepoint has emerged as the sole data discovery platform to attain both FedRAMP High certification and DOD IL4 classification. This achievement underscores its dedication to upholding stringent security protocols, complementing its existing authorizations such as FedRAMP Moderate and DOD IL5 and IL6. The milestone was announced in Washington on April 9, 2025.
news.headline: Casepoint platform attains FedRAMP High security authorization & DOD IL4 designation, marking a milestone in security standards.

news.summary: Middleton, Wisconsin - On April 9, 2025, Ballotpedia unveiled a new resource portal covering the influence of school choice on rural school districts and communities. The portal offers a detailed comparison of various states, providing essential data insights and discussing crucial debates. This comprehensive guide aims to shed light on the significance of school choice in rural education settings.
news.headline: Ballotpedia launches resource on school choice in rural areas, offering state comparisons and data insights.

news.summary: Upgrading the infrastructure by replacing wires and poles is expected to reduce the frequency of power outages for approximately 300 customers of Met-Ed in Reading, Pennsylvania. This initiative is being carried out by FirstEnergy Pennsylvania Electric Company (FE PA), a subsidiary of FirstEnergy Corp. (NYSE: FE). The goal is to enhance the reliability of electric service in eastern Pennsylvania for these customers.
news.headline: Met-Ed is replacing wires and poles to prevent outages for 300 customers in York County, Pennsylvania.

news.summary: A significant investment has been made to boost growth, improve programs, and expand access for numerous young individuals across the state. This historic initiative, fueled by a generous $30 million grant from Lilly Endowment under its Strengthening Youth Programs in Indiana project, aims to positively impact thousands of young people statewide. This support is set to bring about substantial enhancements in services and opportunities for youth in the area.
news.headline: $30 million Lilly Endowment grant fuels growth and program enhancement in Boys & Girls Club organizations across Indiana.

news.summary: Renowned investor Ray Dalio, no longer leading Bridgewater Associates, issues a warning about global trends. He predicts a major breakdown in monetary, political, and geopolitical systems, labeling it a "once in a lifetime" event due to unsustainable conditions. Dalio emphasizes that the current focus on newly implemented tariffs and their effects on markets overlooks the underlying causes and anticipates even greater disruptions. The initial spark may be tariffs, but Dalio asserts deeper-rooted issues are at play. Despite the attention tariffs receive, Dalio highlights larger forces driving global events. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Ray Dalio warns of 'once-in-a-lifetime' breakdown, pointing to major monetary, political, and geopolitical shifts. Focus on larger forces beyond tariffs.

news.summary: On April 9, 2025, Safe & Green Holdings Corp. (NASDAQ: SGBX) revealed the acquisition of County Line Industrial, LLC’s assets and business. Based in Durant, Oklahoma, County Line Industrial, LLC offers welding services in Oklahoma and Texas. This strategic move aims to expand Safe & Green Holdings’ reach in its ready-mix cement and oil and gas sectors. Safe & Green Holdings Corp. is a prominent developer, designer, and fabricator of modular structures. The acquisition is set to bolster the company's offerings and customer base in the region.
news.headline: Safe & Green Holdings Corp. acquires assets and business of County Line Industrial, boosting its oil and gas and modular construction sectors.
Germany’s Incoming Chancellor Merz: We will create a national security council in my office and a national crisis council.

news.summary: An advanced tool for model-based systems engineering (MBSE) is enhancing the capabilities of MBSE through the utilization of artificial intelligence (AI) to enhance speed, accuracy, and automation in all processes. The tool, based in CHANTILLY, Va., announced this development on April 9, 2025, through a press release on PRNewswire.
news.headline: STC introduces Intelligent MBSE™, an AI-powered tool enhancing MBSE with speed, accuracy, and automation.

news.summary: In Rice Lake, Wisconsin, on April 9, 2025, Henry Repeating Arms, a prominent firearm manufacturer in the United States, is continuing its tradition of honoring its key supporters by introducing the American Construction Industry Tribute Edition. This new addition celebrates the construction industry and is part of Henry's efforts to recognize its important stakeholders.
news.headline: Henry Repeating Arms honors American Construction Industry with Tribute Edition rifle in 2025.

news.summary: A significant development in the sports and entertainment memorabilia industry was unveiled by Medical Care Technologies Inc. on April 9, 2025. The company made public its strategic pivot by acquiring Real Game Used (RGU), becoming the first in the sector to leverage artificial intelligence technology. This move, disclosed through PRNewswire, marked a pivotal shift for Medical Care Technologies Inc. (OTC PINK:MDCE), showcasing their commitment to innovation in the realm of sports and entertainment memorabilia.
news.headline: MDCE acquires Real Game Used, the first AI-powered authentication company for memorabilia in a bold move.

news.summary: Schoox, a renowned provider of educational materials, certification courses, and programs, has been chosen by the ALS Association to offer quick and convenient access to learning resources. Based in AUSTIN, Texas, the partnership was announced on April 9, 2025. As a global leader in frontline workforce training, Schoox will assist the ALS Association in enhancing skills development with its wide range of offerings.
news.headline: ALS Association and Schoox team up to provide educational resources for ALS community. AUSTIN, TX, April 9, 2025 - PRNewswire.

news.summary: On April 9, 2025, in Herndon, Virginia, Navient (Nasdaq: NAVI) announced an upcoming audio webcast to discuss its financial performance in the first quarter of 2025. The webcast is scheduled to take place on Wednesday, April 30, 2025, at 8:00 a.m. Eastern Time. The company plans to unveil the results at 7:00 a.m. on the same day on Navient.com/investors. The financial results will also be submitted to the SEC on a Form 8-K, accessible on SEC.gov.
news.headline: Navient to reveal Q1 2025 results in webcast on April 30, at 8:00 am ET. Results to be released by 7:00 am on Navient.com/investors.
Effective Fed Funds rate 4.33% April 8th vs 4.33% April 7th.
Germany’s Incoming Chancellor Merz: Trump has unleashed new turbulence in financial markets, we don't know where that leads.
Future German Coalition fails to agree on possible reactivation of some nuclear power plants.

news.summary: The Federal Reserve is considering intervention as Treasury yields experience a significant increase, even with a growing possibility of a recession. The escalating Trump tariffs have caused a spike in the 10-year Treasury yield, contributing to a decline in the S&P 500. This development has raised concerns about the economic impact and the need for the Federal Reserve to take action.
news.headline: Federal Reserve may intervene as Trump tariffs cause 10-Year Treasury yield spike, risking recession.

news.summary: Seattle-based Badar Ahmed is leading the innovation at Protect AI by creating groundbreaking products that target essential security vulnerabilities in corporate AI environments.
news.headline: Protect AI CTO Badar Ahmed was named Best Product Leader in Product 50 Awards by Amplitude and VentureBeat for developing market-first products addressing security gaps in enterprise AI ecosystems.

news.summary: In Bethesda, CodeSentry-FOSSA collaboration enables users to create detailed SBOMs encompassing open source and binaries in their software. This partnership equips customers to track various aspects of their software, enhancing security.
news.headline: CodeSecure and FOSSA have partnered to provide a single platform for binary and open source analysis, enabling customers to generate comprehensive SBOMs.

news.summary: Dubai-based CRTS Global LLC has recently acquired RAE Energy’s coatings business, known as RAE Coatings. This strategic investment has bolstered CRTS’ position as a key player in the global pipeline coatings market. The acquisition solidifies CRTS as the sole provider offering comprehensive internal and external pipeline field joint coating solutions for the offshore industry, further establishing their leadership in the sector. CRTS, backed by Voyager Interests, a private equity firm headquartered in Houston, now stands out as a prominent player after this move.
news.headline: CRTS Global acquires RAE Energy’s coatings business, enhancing its position in the pipeline coatings market.
ECB bond holdings under PEPP €1.55 trillion as of last week.

news.summary: BREA, California - April 9, 2025 - Mullen Automotive Inc. (NASDAQ: MULN) disclosed a new Partnership and Supply Agreement with Enpower Greentech Inc. (EGI), a prominent player in advanced lithium-ion battery production and technology. This collaboration aims to produce and supply Mullen's SWIFT series SSB. The Enpower EGI SWIFT SSB line is designed for various purposes including commercial vehicles, aerospace, marine, hobby vehicles, material handling, power tools, medical equipment, and drones. This strategic alliance is set to bolster Mullen's position in the electric vehicle market and enhance EGI's foothold in the industry.
news.headline: Mullen Automotive partners with Enpower Greentech to build SWIFT semi solid-state batteries for various industrial applications.
Fed's Kashkari: Falling neutral rate due to tariffs reduces immediate need for rate hike.
Fed's Kashkari: First priority must be keeping long-run inflation expectations anchored.

news.summary: In an announcement made on April 9, 2025, in Boston, the Invest in Others Charitable Foundation revealed significant changes to its leadership team. Jessica Dunham has been appointed as the Chief Operating Officer, while Faith Bitterman will take on the role of Director of Programs. Additionally, Emily Burns Perryman will join the organization as the new Head of Marketing & Communications. These appointments mark a new chapter for IiO as they continue their mission as a nonprofit organization dedicated to making a positive impact.
news.headline: Invest in Others Charitable Foundation promotes Jessica Dunham to COO, Faith Bitterman as Director of Programs, and welcomes Emily Burns Perryman as Head of Marketing & Communications.

news.summary: Students at National Heritage Academies are delving into basic engineering concepts and honing vital social skills like teamwork and communication in Grand Rapids, Michigan. The initiative began on April 9, 2025, at Grand River Preparatory High School. The students are gaining hands-on experience from scratch, starting with a block of wood.
news.headline: Grand River Prep Robotics Team equips students with engineering skills and social development, from teamwork to communications. Grand Rapids, MI, April 9, 2025.

news.summary: Frontline Road Safety, a leading provider of pavement marking services in the United States, has recently completed the acquisition of InfraStripe. This acquisition consolidates their position as the largest company in the industry. With this transaction, Frontline Road Safety solidifies its presence in the market, further expanding its reach across the country. This strategic move will enable the company to enhance its service offerings and cater to a wider customer base.
news.headline: Frontline Road Safety acquires InfraStripe, expanding its national platform. Leader in pavement marking services in U.S.

news.summary: The latest cases offer businesses with advanced, flexible, and affordable cloud computing options, ensuring high performance and scalability.
news.headline: 5th Gen AMD EPYC processors offer top performance for Google Cloud C4D and H4D VMs, enhancing cloud solutions.
Germany’s Incoming Chancellor Merz: Coalition agreement is a strong plan to advance Germany.
Fed's Kashkari: The risk of unanchoring inflation expectations has notably risen.
EU Commission: Countermeasures can be suspended at any time, should the US agree to a fair and balanced negotiated outcome.

news.summary: A new tool called ScamCheck has been introduced by Carefull in New York. It is powered by artificial intelligence and is specifically created to quickly identify, examine, and stop scams before they result in financial losses. This innovative solution aims to provide swift protection against potential scams, showcasing the continuous development in AI technology for fraud prevention.
news.headline: Carefull launches ScamCheck AI tool to protect seniors from scams, detecting and preventing financial harm proactively.

news.summary: Astound, a leading provider of Internet, Mobile, and TV services, revealed its continued collaboration with Habitat for Humanity to back affordable homeownership in communities both within and beyond Astound's service range. This marks the second year of partnership between the two entities, with their initial alliance dating back to April 2024. Last year, Astound organized a total of 48 employee volunteer events, boasting an impressive turnout of 498 volunteers who engaged in activities across 26 cities within 11 states nationwide. Their collective efforts amounted to a substantial contribution of 3,000 volunteer hours towards supporting Habitat for Humanity's mission.
news.headline: Astound continues partnership with Habitat for Humanity in 2nd year, 498 volunteers in 26 cities across 11 states in 2025.

news.summary: American Integrity Insurance Company based in Tampa, Florida has promoted Patrick Madigan to the position of Senior Vice President of Underwriting and Client Services. In his new role, Patrick will be responsible for overseeing the company's underwriting strategy and improving risk management practices. He will also focus on enhancing service offerings for policyholders and agency partners. Patrick's leadership has played a key role in establishing American Integrity as a reputable figure in property insurance.
news.headline: Patrick Madigan promoted to Senior VP of Underwriting and Client Services at American Integrity Insurance Company in Tampa, FL.

news.summary: Frontdoor, Inc., a top provider of home warranties traded on NASDAQ as FTDR, disclosed plans to unveil its Q1 2025 financial outcomes and conduct a conference call on May 1, 2025, at 7:30 a.m. CT (8:30 a.m. ET). To join the call, individuals should sign up at https://www.webcaster4.com/Webcast/Page/3067/52314 and will later receive access information via email. This news comes as Frontdoor continues its trend as the leading company in the home warranty sector.
news.headline: Frontdoor, Inc. (NASDAQ: FTDR) to announce Q1 2025 results on May 1, 2025. Conference call at 7:30am CT (8:30am ET).

news.summary: According to recent reports, the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.8%, its lowest level in over a decade. This decrease represents around 250,000 fewer unemployed individuals compared to last year. Additionally, the economy has seen a growth of 3.5% in the last quarter, marking a significant improvement. The government has stated that the job market is steadily improving, with sectors such as technology and healthcare showing promising growth and creating new employment opportunities. Despite these positive trends, concerns remain about wage stagnation and underemployment in certain regions. Experts predict continued economic growth in the coming months, which is expected to further reduce the unemployment rate and boost overall job market stability.
news.headline: Oil prices plummet amid weakening economic confidence due to China-U.S. tariffs.

news.summary: On April 9, 2025, in Tampa, Florida, Better Choice Company, Inc. (NYSE American: BTTR), a company focusing on pet health and wellness, disclosed receiving official confirmation from NYSE American LLC that they have regained compliance with all ongoing listing criteria outlined in Part 10 of the NYSE American Company Guide.
news.headline: Better Choice Company (NYSE: BTTR) complies with NYSE American listing standards, receives formal notice - April 09, 2025.
Fed's Kashkari: Near-term neutral rate will likely fall amid tariffs.
EU Commission: We will impose first countermeasures against US tariffs on April 15.
EU Commission: It secures backing from EU countries for first countermeasures against US tariffs.
Fed's Kashkari: Policy is tightening on its own, reducing the need to hike.

news.summary: RPM Raceway is enhancing its venue with an unprecedented 3,600-foot track and cutting-edge racing technology. Located in Long Island, New York, the immersive racing and entertainment destination is celebrating the reopening of its Long Island location on Wednesday, April 9, 2025.
news.headline: RPM Raceway Long Island reopens with the world's longest indoor go-kart track at 3,600 feet, featuring the latest racing technology.

news.summary: Hutt, with years of experience in regulations, joins to support the progress of a nanoparticle technology platform. On April 9, 2025, EVŌQ Nano, a company specializing in nanoscience creating unique nanoparticles for various industries, revealed this development.
news.headline: Peter Hutt joins EVŌQ Nano as a board member, bringing regulatory expertise to advance nanoparticle tech.

news.summary: On April 9, 2025, in Los Angeles, Venbrook Group LLC revealed the launch of a Corporate Benefits & Specialty Health division. As a leading independently owned insurance brokerage, claims, and risk management consulting firm in the U.S., Venbrook aims to further expand its offerings. The company's new division will focus on providing specialized health services. Known for its rapid growth, Venbrook continues to solidify its position in the industry with this strategic move.
news.headline: Venbrook Group expands benefits division, names Alison Myers president of new practice in Los Angeles on April 9, 2025.
